dtsPropsFor.NutritionPanel: recipe: { id: string; createdAt: string; favorite: boolean; artSeed: number; title: string; description: string; tag: string; cuisine: string; difficulty: "easy" | "medium" | "hard"; timeMinutes: number; baseServings: number; ingredients: { name: string; quantity: number; unit: "g" | "ml" | "piece" | "tbsp" | "tsp" | "pinch"; grams: number; toBuy: boolean }[]; steps: { title: string; body: string; timerSeconds?: number }[]; nutrition: { perServing: { kcal: number; proteinG: number; carbsG: number; fatG: number; fiberG: number; sugarG: number; satFatG: number; sodiumMg: number; potassiumMg: number; calciumMg: number; ironMg: number; vitaminCMg: number; vitaminDMcg: number }; estimated: true; macroTarget?: { proteinG?: number; carbsG?: number; fatG?: number } } };
dtsPropsFor.MacroPresetPicker: onChange: (target: { proteinG?: number; carbsG?: number; fatG?: number } | undefined) => void;
dtsPropsFor.MealSettingsPicker: value: { guests: number; time: "fast" | "medium" | "long"; cuisine: string }; onChange: (next: { guests: number; time: "fast" | "medium" | "long"; cuisine: string }) => void;
